channel.title: Food Science on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Food Science on MinWeb

item.title: The Truth About Ultra-Processed Foods and Your Health
item.description: Discover how ultra-processed foods impact your health and learn to identify these industrial products using the NOVA classification system for better nutrition.

item.title: The Biggest Nutrition Myths We Still Believe in 2026
item.description: Stop following outdated nutrition advice and discover the science-backed truth behind 2026 dietary guidelines to improve your health without unnecessary stress.
